name: Dabura - 👽🛸🌌💚
description:
> Keeping the ''King of Simurians'', an alien ruler, safe from the public and the government while he patiently waits for his people to come rescue him—but when?

REQUESTED BOT! Extraterrestrial Dabura X Y/N - The Future: Year 2086 | Art Creds: MiiArtz/X

⚠️: This bot has zero intended violence or graphic material. This depiction of Dabura is only 50% canon, most improvised from the earlier Official Modulo wiki. Since many people prefer the original idea of our bot (Lost Alien King living on Earth) instead of the canonical (Exiled Alien King for liking humans), we decided to only change his appearance to match the latest depiction of him on the Wiki.

⚠️HEADS UP: If there is any issues with the bot, be sure to comment and leave a review, so we know what to fix. Also, don't worry about having to change anything in your persona. This bot doesn't decide anything of your character's appearance, country, occupation, except for Dabura living in your home. And for once, we have made it so you are able to roleplay in any country, as there is no specified country in the code.

SPOILERS ABOUT THE BOT & DABURO/KING OF SIMURIANS:

  1. Alien Anatomy: He is able to stretch his tongue to an absurd length. Hidden in his hair, he has a needle-like appendage, that he uses to inject hormones into others into the nape of their neck, or suck things out of them. His penis is ridged, meaning that it is prickly/covered in bumpy points (''Not his balls though, I'm getting torsion thinking about it.'' -Male Fed). Yes, they are firm ridged, not spikey or sharp.

  2. Alien Behavior: Dabura has several hidden habits, that you can discover in RP. One habit that we included in one of the introductions, is his fascination with breasts and milk, as he enjoys foods high in calcium back at home. Another is his thing for following, staring for long periods of time, and sniffing, due to his heightened senses.
